scripts.supabase:link: corepack pnpm dlx supabase link --workdir infra/supabase
scripts.supabase:db:push: corepack pnpm dlx supabase db push --workdir infra/supabase
scripts.supabase:db:reset: corepack pnpm dlx supabase db reset --workdir infra/supabase
scripts.vercel:link: corepack pnpm dlx vercel link --cwd apps/web
scripts.vercel:env:pull: corepack pnpm dlx vercel env pull .env.local --cwd apps/web
